response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video from 00:00 to 05:01.000. 2. Identified the intro talk from 00:00 to 02:45.000. 3. Identified the performance of 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)' starting at 02:45.001 based on on-screen text. 4. Performed a search for 'キツネノマド Raon Giga TeddyLoid lyrics'. 5. Retrieved the full lyrics for the song. 6. Constructed the final JSON response with the detected scenes, song metadata, and complete lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video features the VTuber Hakos Baelz giving an introductory talk followed by a vocal performance of the song 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)'.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz speaks to the audience, introducing the song and her outfit. No vocal music is playing.
Hakos Baelz performs 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)' while dancing.
